sections.a_description: A curated encyclopedia of web design styles. Each page is presented entirely in the aesthetic it describes — the design is the content.

sections.html:
What is UI Lookbook?

UI Lookbook is a visual encyclopedia of web design styles. From retro aesthetics to modern minimalism, each style page is designed entirely in the aesthetic it describes — giving you an immersive feel for the design language, not just a description of it.

Every style includes curated color palettes, typography pairings, design principles, and AI prompts to help you bring the aesthetic to life in your own projects.

Who is it for?

Designers, developers, and creative teams looking for inspiration or a starting point for their next project. Whether you’re building a brand, redesigning a website, or exploring new visual directions — UI Lookbook helps you find and understand the style that fits.

How it works

Browse styles by category, explore color palettes and font pairings, and use the built-in AI prompts to generate images and layouts in any style. Each page is a self-contained reference you can return to anytime.
